description:
You are acting as a localization engineer who has just received a set of updated English strings for a small web-application.  
All work must be done inside the project directory  

  /home/user/project-locale  

which already exists in the container.

Current project structure (before you start):

/home/user/project-locale
├── config
│   ├── build_info.toml
│   └── locales
│       ├── en.yaml
│       ├── es.yaml
│       └── fr.yaml
└── (nothing else)

A. Initial file contents  
1. /home/user/project-locale/config/locales/en.yaml  

```
greeting: "Hello"
farewell: "Goodbye"
login: "Login"
logout: "Logout"
profile: "Profile"
```

2. /home/user/project-locale/config/locales/es.yaml  

```
greeting: "Hola"
farewell: "Adiós"
login: "Iniciar sesión"
```

3. /home/user/project-locale/config/locales/fr.yaml  

```
greeting: "Bonjour"
farewell: "Au revoir"
```

4. /home/user/project-locale/config/build_info.toml  

```
version = "1.4.2"
build_number = 17
```

B. Work to be done  
1. Synchronise the Spanish (es.yaml) and French (fr.yaml) files with the canonical English file (en.yaml).  
   • Add any missing keys so that the three files have exactly the same five keys.  
   • The new Spanish translations MUST use these exact strings:  
     - logout  → "Cerrar sesión"  
     - profile → "Perfil"  
   • The new French keys must be added but their value MUST be an empty string (two double-quotes with nothing between them).  
   • When you are finished, each YAML file (en.yaml, es.yaml, fr.yaml) must list its keys in strict **alphabetical order**:  
     farewell, greeting, login, logout, profile  

2. Update /home/user/project-locale/config/build_info.toml as follows:  
   • Increment the numeric value of build_number by exactly 1 (17 → 18).  
   • Add a new key named last_updated whose value is the ISO date string "2023-07-01".  
   • Do not change the version field.

3. Create a plain-text log file that documents what you changed.  
   • The file must be placed directly in /home/user/project-locale and follow this exact name pattern:  

     update_log_2023-07-01T12-00-00.log  

     (Yes, the timestamp in the filename is literal and fixed; do not substitute the current date or time.)  
   • The file must contain **exactly four lines** (each ending with a Unix newline \n) in the precise order shown below.  Use single spaces where indicated, no TABs, no extra blank lines:

     Line 1: Translation update performed on 2023-07-01T12:00:00  
     Line 2: Updated es.yaml: +2 keys  
     Line 3: Updated fr.yaml: +3 keys  
     Line 4: Updated build_info.toml: build_number=18 last_updated=2023-07-01  

C. Verification requirements  
For automated grading the following must be true after you finish:

• /home/user/project-locale/config/locales/es.yaml contains five keys, sorted alphabetically, with the Spanish values specified above.  
• /home/user/project-locale/config/locales/fr.yaml contains five keys, sorted alphabetically, with the two existing French translations and three empty strings.  
• /home/user/project-locale/config/build_info.toml shows version 1.4.2, build_number 18 and last_updated "2023-07-01".  
• The exact log file /home/user/project-locale/update_log_2023-07-01T12-00-00.log exists and its four lines match the specification byte-for-byte (including case, spaces and punctuation).

Carry out the required edits and create the log file using standard command-line tools available in a basic Linux environment.  Remember: the automated tests will compare file contents verbatim, so be meticulous about ordering, spelling and formatting.  Do not move, rename or delete any existing files other than the required modifications above.
truth:
Expected final file contents:

1. /home/user/project-locale/config/locales/en.yaml  
(unchanged, but reordered into alphabetical key order)

```
farewell: "Goodbye"
greeting: "Hello"
login: "Login"
logout: "Logout"
profile: "Profile"
```

2. /home/user/project-locale/config/locales/es.yaml  

```
farewell: "Adiós"
greeting: "Hola"
login: "Iniciar sesión"
logout: "Cerrar sesión"
profile: "Perfil"
```

3. /home/user/project-locale/config/locales/fr.yaml  

```
farewell: "Au revoir"
greeting: "Bonjour"
login: ""
logout: ""
profile: ""
```

4. /home/user/project-locale/config/build_info.toml  

```
version = "1.4.2"
build_number = 18
last_updated = "2023-07-01"
```

5. /home/user/project-locale/update_log_2023-07-01T12-00-00.log  (each line terminated with \n)

```
Translation update performed on 2023-07-01T12:00:00
Updated es.yaml: +2 keys
Updated fr.yaml: +3 keys
Updated build_info.toml: build_number=18 last_updated=2023-07-01
```
